title: Chimney Balloon 14 x 38 Inch Large Chimney Draught Excluder
features: DIMENSIONS: Suitable for chimneys up to 36cm x 96cm
ENERGY SAVING: Prevents warm air escape and reduces heating costs
DRAUGHT CONTROL: Minimises cold air infiltration
EASY INSTALLATION: Includes free mouth inflation tube
UK MADE: Manufactured in the United Kingdom
description: Product Description What is a Chimney Balloon ? Original and best Our Chimney Balloon is the original inflatable draught excluder for chimneys, and now it’s even tougher! It’s still the most effective and safest option out there, keeping your home cosy and draft-free. Make your home more energy efficient The nifty device sits inside a chimney to stop warm air from escaping up a chimney and cold air from getting in. Removable and easy to use The removable chimney draught excluder simply needs placing in the chimney, inflating and hey presto! Energy savings galore! Benefits of a Chimney Balloon Saves energy by stopping warm air escaping through your chimney Reduces energy bills by an average of 4% Reduces CO2 output Stops wildlife and debris falling through the chimney Reduces wind noise down a chimney How does a Chimney Balloon work? Works like double glazed windows! Putting a Chimney Balloon in your open chimney is like giving it the benefits of double glazing. The balloon inflates to snugly fit against all four walls, holding itself firmly in place. There's a tiny vent on the side that lets a little air flow through, so your chimney can "breathe" while still being a great draught stopper and preventing any dampness. Stops warm air escaping from your home! The balloon's clever double-walled design lets it puff up like a cozy pillow, snugly sealing off the chimney. With its top and bottom layers creating a double barrier, the balloon traps air inside, acting as insulation. This means cold air can't sneak down the chimney, and warm air stays put, not drifting away. Enjoy a warmer home! Once you install a Chimney Balloon, it doesn't just stop warm air from escaping up the chimney—it also prevents cold drafts from sneaking in through other places like gaps in doors and windows. So, when you turn on the heating, it stays inside, warming your home more effectively instead of slipping away through the chimney. You might even find you can turn the heating down a notch! Our Chimney Balloons vs others on the markets 100% safe – The Chimney Balloon is the safest inflatable chimney draught excluder on the market. Each balloon comes with a ‘Remember to Remove’ tag to remind you to take it out before you light a fire. PVC free – our balloon is the only one the market that is PVC free. When heated PVC emits harmful quantities of dioxins which are highly toxic to humans. Available in four different sizes – Don’t waste your money on those one-size-fits-all Chimney Balloons—chimney sizes vary a lot, and one size definitely doesn’t fit all! You’ll end up with gaps and pesky drafts. We offer four different sizes so you can find the perfect fit for your chimney and keep those drafts out. Made in the UK – all our Chimney Balloons are made in Watford. The workshop has made hundreds of thousands of successful Chimney Balloons that have been exported all over the world. A quality product – Every detail, from the materials to the double-layer design, ensures the Chimney Balloon works effectively and lasts for years. How do I fit my Chimney Balloon? 1. Inflate a little 2. Locate it in position 3. Continue to inflate until it holds itself in place. 4. You can use the mouth inflation tube or a foot pump to do this (although a foot pump makes life a lot easier). 5. If you used the mouth inflation tube, the balloon might shrink a bit as it cools. Just add a bit more air to fill it out again! 6. Hang the “Remember to Remove” notice somewhere where it’s visible 7 If you're installing the Chimney Balloon in a windy spot with a strong updraft, it's smart to tie it to the grate with a piece of string. That way, it won't get whisked up the chimney!
